name: com.somosvelora/velora
description: Argentine agentic commerce toolkit over MCP. Real ARCA/AFIP electronic invoicing, MercadoPago payments, Andreani logistics, cash register, catalog and WhatsApp — authenticated, production-grade tools for AI agents operating in Argentina. The only MCP server that executes real AFIP invoicing + MercadoPago payments (not just docs/search).
